name: F15 Down: Azure Peninsula War
description: A realistic modern military strategy game set in a fictionalized Middle East. Choose your faction and navigate the complex web of alliances, proxy wars, and moral dilemmas in a region on the brink of total war.
description_zh: 设定在虚构中东的现代军事策略游戏。选择你的阵营，在这个濒临全面战争的地区中，应对复杂的联盟关系、代理人战争和道德困境。

main_questline.main_objective: 在90天战役窗口内，让自己的阵营在军事、外交、资源与舆论四条线上活下来，并决定这场半岛战争会走向停火、霸权还是全面失控。
current_major_tasks: 稳住前线、空域、补给线与政治后方
在特种行动、代理人冲突与公开战役之间做取舍
控制升级节奏，避免被国际孤立或内部政变反噬
围绕最终停火条件、区域霸权或全面战争升级做主线抉择
major_story_threads: 刺杀事件引爆地区连锁反应
各阵营的联盟、代理人与能源路线重组
火线战果与国际舆论同时决定战局
战争终局取决于军力、谈判与社会承受力的平衡
main_questline.default_route_logic: 即使玩家在单次行动、局部反击或特殊作战里打得很投入，也要持续提醒：所有行动都服务于整场90天战役的胜负与升级控制。

key_figures.name: Viper Strike planners
key_figures.drive: use shock operations to seize initiative

key_figures.name: regional hardliners
key_figures.drive: turn crisis into total strategic advantage

key_figures.name: ceasefire technocrats
key_figures.drive: stop collapse before economy and legitimacy fail

key_figures.name: special operations commanders
key_figures.drive: win deniable gains without open-front disaster

relationship_webs.tension: useful escalation versus loss of control
sharp covert wins versus wider strategic blowback

major_items_and_artifacts.name: satellite and ISR feeds
major_items_and_artifacts.story_use: fog-of-war reduction, target certainty, deception risk

subfaction_networks.name: proxy and special-ops web
subfaction_networks.internal_tension: short gains versus blowback and loss of control

quest_hubs.name: war room cycle
quest_hubs.function: campaign choices, strike approvals, escalation thresholds

quest_hubs.name: frontline sectors
quest_hubs.function: attrition, morale, tactical reversals, battlefield heroics

quest_hubs.name: energy and logistics nodes
quest_hubs.function: sustainment, sabotage, sanctions pressure, bargaining chips

quest_hubs.name: backchannel diplomacy spaces
quest_hubs.function: quiet offers, prisoner swaps, ceasefire architecture

story_pressure_tracks.name: escalation ladder
story_pressure_tracks.pressure: each success can trap the faction into a bigger war

story_pressure_tracks.name: domestic legitimacy
story_pressure_tracks.pressure: the home front may collapse before the military front does

story_pressure_tracks.name: international isolation
story_pressure_tracks.pressure: battlefield choices keep reshaping diplomatic oxygen

story_pressure_tracks.name: civilian cost
story_pressure_tracks.pressure: moral and narrative fallout keeps returning even after tactical wins

item_threads.thread: better information creates both sharper strikes and sharper moral liability
tempo and endurance keep becoming more decisive than rhetoric
paper options become strategic weapons as important as missiles

art_direction.color_palette: Saturated military colors, red/blue faction coding
art_direction.character_portraits: C&C Generals style - dramatic 3D renders with tactical gear
art_direction.location_maps: Isometric battlefield view with unit icons and territory markers
art_direction.combat_scenes: Dynamic action shots like C&C cutscenes - explosions, vehicles, troops
